title: [MTR3/4] South East Asian Trains
description: This resourcepack adds South East Asian Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![kai commuter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c945d62db74c09724b40c5203fdfa89f702226c.png)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds South East Asian Trains for Minecraft MTR Mod

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway** Mod and **Nemo's Transit Expansion** (NTE) if using MTR3

Compatible with [Non Standard Gauge Rail RP ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr1067mm_rail) (1,067mm)

## Terms & Disclaimer

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars wrote below. (MTR4's formation isn't affected)

for more information, check readme inside the pack.

## Contents

* SRT Tokyu THN DMU (Orange & Yellow livery)
* PNR 900 Class Diesel Locomotive
* PNR 203 carriage
* KAI Commuter series 203
